title: libsoup security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.72.0-12.3]
- Fix patch for CVE-2025-14523 to handle comparison case-insensitively

[2.72.0-12.2]
- Backport patch for CVE-2025-14523

[2.72.0-12.1]
- Backport patch for CVE-2025-4945 and CVE-2025-11021
full_text:
[2.72.0-12.3]
- Fix patch for CVE-2025-14523 to handle comparison case-insensitively

[2.72.0-12.2]
- Backport patch for CVE-2025-14523

[2.72.0-12.1]
- Backport patch for CVE-2025-4945 and CVE-2025-11021
